keyEvents.text: Luka Chalwell (British Virgin Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  British Virgin Islands 0, Guatemala 1. Óscar Castellanos (Guatemala) right footed shot from outside the box to the top left corner.
Goal!  British Virgin Islands 0, Guatemala 2. Rubio Rubín (Guatemala) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by José Ardón with a headed pass.
Second Half begins British Virgin Islands 0, Guatemala 2.
Substitution, British Virgin Islands. Kristian Javier replaces Joshua Bertie.
Substitution, British Virgin Islands. Robert Green IV replaces Justin Smith.
Jadon Abrams (British Virgin Islands) is shown the yellow card for hand ball.

Substitution, Guatemala. José Martínez replaces Rubio Rubín.

Frankie Beckles (British Virgin Islands) is shown the yellow card.
